info.name: gopress API
info.description:
Complete collection for gopress — HTML → PDF service.

**Required variables:**
- `base_url` → `http://localhost:3000` (adjust if using a different port)
- `examples_dir` → absolute path to the `postman/examples` folder in this repo

**Available endpoints:**
- `GET /health` — service health check
- `GET /version` — binary version
- `GET /metrics` — Prometheus metrics
- `POST /pdf` — convert HTML to PDF (JSON or multipart)

variable.description: Absolute path to the postman/examples folder in this repository

request.description: Returns `{"status":"ok"}` when the service is up.
Prometheus metrics in plain text format. Useful for Grafana / Prometheus scraping.

item.name: POST /pdf — JSON
item.description:
Convert HTML to PDF using `application/json`. Best for self-contained HTML (no external assets). Schema: ```json { "html": "

...

", "options": { ... } // optional } ```

request.description: Minimal request: HTML only, no options. Use this to verify the service is responding.
Electronic purchase authorization: logo, items table, approval workflow, signature blocks.
Full invoice: company, client, services table, subtotal + tax + total.
Dashboard in landscape orientation with dark background. Requires `printBackground: true` for Chrome to render the background color.

Demonstrates `displayHeaderFooter` with Chrome placeholders:
- `<span class='date'>` → current date
- `<span class='pageNumber'>` → current page
- `<span class='totalPages'>` → total pages
- `<span class='title'>` → document title
- `<span class='url'>` → document URL
Prints only pages 1 and 2 of a 3-page document. Useful for extracting specific sections.

Explicit A4 size in inches. Common paper size reference:
- A4: 8.27 × 11.69
- Letter: 8.5 × 11
- Legal: 8.5 × 14
- A3: 11.69 × 16.54

item.name: POST /pdf — Multipart (with files)
item.description:
Convert HTML to PDF using `multipart/form-data`.
Required when the HTML references external assets (CSS, images, fonts).

**Before using:** set the `examples_dir` variable to the absolute path of the `postman/examples` folder in this repository.

Supported fields:
- `index.html` — main HTML file (required)
- any asset (`style.css`, `logo.png`, etc.) — accessible from the HTML
- `options.json` — PDF options (optional)

formdata.description: Main HTML file — adjust the path in the examples_dir variable

request.description:
Sends `02_autorizacion.html` directly as multipart.
Equivalent curl:
```bash
curl -X POST {{base_url}}/pdf -F "index.html=@02_autorizacion.html" --output out.pdf
```

formdata.description: HTML that references style.css with <link rel='stylesheet' href='style.css'>

request.description:
Quarterly report with external CSS. The server spins up a local HTTP server and resolves `href='style.css'` automatically.

Equivalent curl:
```bash
curl -X POST {{base_url}}/pdf \
  -F "index.html=@04_multipart/index.html" \
  -F "style.css=@04_multipart/style.css" \
  --output report.pdf
```

Full report with CSS and PDF options. The `options.json` configures margins, landscape, header/footer, etc.

Contents of this example's options.json:
```json
{
  "printBackground": true,
  "marginTop": 0.6,
  "marginBottom": 0.6,
  "marginLeft": 0.6,
  "marginRight": 0.6
}
```
